topic: A person playing a game of 'Jenga' and pulling out a middle block.
raw_generation:
{"script": "INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY
A close-up reveals a Jenga tower standing tall on a wooden table. The room is warm, with soft music in the background.
ALEX (smiling nervously): Here goes nothing.
The camera pulls back to show the table and the whole tower.

CLOSE-UP: ALEX's hand hovers over the middle layer of blocks...
ALEX: This is the middle block—the hardest to pull, but the most satisfying when it comes loose.
He breathes in, centers himself, and slides the block out slowly.
The tower tilts, wood creaks; a dramatic guitar note plays in the soundtrack.
ALEX: Phew... that was close.
The tower steadies for a moment, then settles with a wobble.
The camera circles to a wide shot as the tower remains upright.

FADE OUT: Title card: The Middle Block Moment", "narration": "In this tense moment, all attention focuses on the middle block. The tower could topple with one wrong pull. The player takes a measured breath, steadies the hand, and nudges the block free. A tiny creak swells into a suspenseful note as the blocks settle. Will the tower survive this daring move, or will gravity claim the topples? This is the middle block moment—the balance between risk and calm."}

parsed_generation.script:
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY
A close-up reveals a Jenga tower standing tall on a wooden table. The room is warm, with soft music in the background.
ALEX (smiling nervously): Here goes nothing.
The camera pulls back to show the table and the whole tower.

CLOSE-UP: ALEX's hand hovers over the middle layer of blocks...
ALEX: This is the middle block—the hardest to pull, but the most satisfying when it comes loose.
He breathes in, centers himself, and slides the block out slowly.
The tower tilts, wood creaks; a dramatic guitar note plays in the soundtrack.
ALEX: Phew... that was close.
The tower steadies for a moment, then settles with a wobble.
The camera circles to a wide shot as the tower remains upright.

FADE OUT: Title card: The Middle Block Moment
parsed_generation.narration: In this tense moment, all attention focuses on the middle block. The tower could topple with one wrong pull. The player takes a measured breath, steadies the hand, and nudges the block free. A tiny creak swells into a suspenseful note as the blocks settle. Will the tower survive this daring move, or will gravity claim the topples? This is the middle block moment—the balance between risk and calm.

feedback:
The scene centers on the middle block and conveys tension, but it lacks timestamped shot progression and the concise, shot-by-shot framing found in the gold standard. To improve, restructure into explicit [00:00-00:02], [00:02-00:04], etc., with clearly defined camera angles (close-up, macro, tracking) and a focused sequence: test the block, slide it out, handle wobble or toppling. Align the pacing and action-first narration to mirror the gold standard style.

strengths: Focused on the middle block tension with clear actor intent.
Uses varied camera language (close-up, wide, tilts) and clear action flow.
fixes: Add explicit timestamped shot segments in the [00:00-00:02] format.
Match the gold standard's concise, action-first pacing (test block, slide block, note tower wobble or placement).
